program.step_branch_strategy: Create each step branch from latest gen-fixes, open PR, merge after review.
program.commit_strategy: One focused commit per step (maximum two only when migration/client generation split is unavoidable).
program.verification_strategy: Run pnpm lint and step-specific checks before merge; include outputs in PR.

global_done_checklist: Checks executed (pnpm lint and step-specific checks)

steps.title: Program bootstrap
steps.commit_message: chore(repo): bootstrap refactor program workflow and guardrails
tasks: Create docs/refactor-program.md with branch, commit, and PR rules
Create docs/definition-of-done.md for security, UI, i18n, and production criteria
Add PR template fields for step id, scope, and verification
Ensure this step does not change runtime logic

steps.title: Fail-closed admin check
steps.commit_message: fix(auth): make admin authorization fail-closed by default
tasks: Update lib/auth-guard.ts so empty ADMIN_EMAILS does not grant admin access
Add explicit error/log path for missing admin configuration
Update .env.example with required ADMIN_EMAILS format
Verify admin routes block non-admin users
verification: Manual admin route access test (non-admin denied)

steps.title: User role model in DB
steps.commit_message: feat(auth): introduce UserRole enum and role field
tasks: Add UserRole enum and role field in prisma/schema.prisma with USER default
Create Prisma migration for role model
Update seed/bootstrap logic to create at least one admin user safely
Regenerate Prisma client and verify type usage compiles
verification: Type check/build for Prisma client consumers

steps.title: Centralized authz helpers
steps.commit_message: refactor(auth): add centralized requireAuthenticated and requireAdmin guards
tasks: Add shared server authz utility (requireAuthenticatedUser and requireAdminUser)
Ensure helper returns consistent typed result and error behavior
Replace direct session checks where practical in auth modules
Add unit tests for helper behavior

steps.title: Layout-level guard hardening
steps.commit_message: refactor(auth): enforce role guard in protected and admin layouts
tasks: Update protected and admin layouts to use centralized authz helper
Ensure locale-safe redirects for unauthorized access
Validate no redirect loops for expired or deleted sessions
Verify admin layout blocks USER role accounts
verification: Manual navigation tests for protected/admin routes

steps.title: Server actions admin enforcement
steps.commit_message: fix(auth): enforce admin authorization on mutating server actions
tasks: Add admin guard to mutating actions in blog, products, partners, team, settings, and contact-status
Keep public actions public with explicit separation
Standardize unauthorized response payload shape
Verify mutations fail for non-admin users
verification: Mutation authorization tests for USER role

steps.title: Secure contact attachments endpoint
steps.commit_message: fix(security): protect contact attachments download endpoint
tasks: Add admin auth check in app/api/contact/[id]/attachments/route.ts
Ensure 401 and 403 behavior is explicit and non-leaky
Keep existing single-file redirect and zip behavior for authorized users
Verify endpoint cannot be accessed anonymously

steps.title: Upload authorization consistency
steps.commit_message: fix(upload): align uploadthing middleware with role-based authorization
tasks: Enforce admin role on admin upload endpoints (blogCoverImage, productGallery, projectGallery, partnerLogo)
Keep contactAttachments public only if explicitly intended
Document auth policy per upload endpoint
Verify USER role cannot upload via admin endpoints

steps.title: Registration policy hardening
steps.commit_message: feat(auth): gate public signup behind feature flag
tasks: Add allowPublicSignup feature flag in config and env
Hide or disable register route when flag is false
Show clear UX message when signup is disabled
Document first-admin bootstrap flow
verification: Manual test with allowPublicSignup true and false

steps.title: Auth boundary tests
steps.commit_message: test(auth): add integration coverage for admin and user boundaries
tasks: Add integration tests for admin-only routes, actions, and APIs
Add tests for USER denied behavior
Add tests for missing ADMIN_EMAILS and role bootstrap edge cases
Add CI command to run auth boundary suite

steps.title: Contact submission single-path refactor
steps.commit_message: refactor(contact): unify contact submission through one backend path
tasks: Choose one backend path as source of truth for contact submit (prefer server action)
Update public form to use the selected path
Remove or deprecate duplicate path
Verify attachment persistence and status defaults remain correct
verification: Manual contact submit flow test with and without attachments

steps.title: Consistent API result contract
steps.commit_message: refactor(api): standardize API success and error envelopes
tasks: Define shared API result schema for route handlers
Apply contract across project, blog, contact, and search APIs where practical
Standardize error codes/messages for client mapping
Update frontend consumers to the normalized contract
verification: API contract tests or smoke tests

steps.title: About content wiring
steps.commit_message: feat(content): render managed about content on public about page
tasks: Render settings.aboutHtml on public About page
Sanitize or validate rendered HTML content path
Add empty-state fallback
Verify localized metadata remains correct
verification: Manual About page content rendering test

steps.title: Shared admin page shell component
steps.commit_message: feat(ui): introduce reusable AdminPageShell component
tasks: Create shared admin page shell with header, title, description, and actions slots
Normalize spacing, container widths, and sticky header behavior
Provide loading and empty-state slots
Document shell usage pattern
verification: Visual QA on representative admin page

steps.title: Migrate admin pages to shared shell
steps.commit_message: refactor(ui): migrate admin pages to AdminPageShell
tasks: Migrate dashboard, blog, messages, partners, products, projects, settings, team, and profile pages
Remove duplicate page scaffolding markup
Keep route behavior unchanged
Visual-check desktop and mobile consistency

steps.title: Shared data table foundation
steps.commit_message: feat(ui): add shared AdminDataTable foundation
tasks: Create reusable table scaffolding with toolbar, filters, pagination, and empty state
Provide unified row actions and destructive action hooks
Expose i18n-ready labels and props for table UI text
Ensure compatibility with TanStack advanced use cases

steps.title: Migrate custom tables
steps.commit_message: refactor(ui): migrate custom admin tables to shared table framework
tasks: Migrate partners, products, and messages tables to shared table foundation
Normalize search, filter, and pagination behavior
Replace hardcoded labels with translated keys
Verify row actions and destructive dialogs are consistent

steps.title: Loading and skeleton coverage
steps.commit_message: feat(ui): add consistent route loading and skeleton states
tasks: Add missing loading.tsx files for primary public and admin routes
Replace ad-hoc animate-pulse loaders with shared Skeleton usage
Ensure table routes show consistent loading placeholders
Verify no layout shift regressions

steps.title: Primitive enforcement pass
steps.commit_message: refactor(ui): replace raw controls with shared UI primitives
tasks: Replace raw checkboxes in blog and settings with Checkbox primitive
Replace raw interaction buttons with shared Button where applicable
Keep raw hidden file inputs only where technically required
Align focus, disabled, and error states across controls
verification: Accessibility smoke test for form controls

steps.title: Modal/menu/button consistency
steps.commit_message: refactor(ui): normalize dialogs, menus, and button semantics
tasks: Standardize destructive confirmation copy and button variants
Standardize icon button sizes and aria-label behavior
Standardize dropdown action ordering (edit first, delete last)
Verify keyboard accessibility across dialog and menu interactions

steps.title: Admin and auth i18n extraction
steps.commit_message: refactor(i18n): externalize admin and auth hardcoded strings
tasks: Extract hardcoded literals from auth forms, admin pages, and admin tables
Add keys in i18n/messages/en.json and i18n/messages/it.json
Replace hardcoded toasts and placeholders
Verify no missing-key runtime warnings

steps.title: Public and shared i18n extraction
steps.commit_message: refactor(i18n): externalize public and shared component literals
tasks: Extract literals from navbar, footer, search, legal, and public shared components
Localize metadata labels and helper text where applicable
Ensure fallback strategy for optional translation keys
Verify EN and IT parity for added keys

steps.title: i18n automation checks
steps.commit_message: chore(i18n): add automated checks for message completeness and hardcoded literals
tasks: Stabilize scripts/validate-messages.ts execution path
Add hardcoded-literal detection script for locale-dependent areas
Add both checks to CI pipeline
Fail CI on missing translation keys in touched namespaces

steps.title: Legal pages production content
steps.commit_message: feat(content): replace legal placeholder pages with approved localized copy
tasks: Replace privacy and terms placeholder text with approved legal content
Provide localized legal content for EN and IT
Update metadata descriptions to production-ready text
Add legal sign-off note before release

steps.title: Brand source-of-truth unification
steps.commit_message: refactor(branding): centralize branding source across metadata and UI
tasks: Define single branding source strategy (settings with static fallback)
Update root metadata generation to use unified source
Align navbar, footer, and hero branding usage with same source
Verify OpenGraph, Twitter, and canonical metadata consistency

steps.title: Typography token normalization
steps.commit_message: refactor(ui): normalize font tokens and remove conflicting body font bindings
tasks: Remove conflicting multi-font class usage on body
Map CSS font tokens to actual declared font variables
Define clear rules for sans, headline, and mono usage
Visual QA on key public and admin pages

steps.title: Upload flow consolidation
steps.commit_message: refactor(media): consolidate image upload components and validation rules
tasks: Extract shared uploader core for product, project, and partner use cases
Reuse shared validation helpers and formatting logic
Keep endpoint-specific constraints configurable
Verify alt text, ordering, and remove flows across all galleries
verification: Manual upload flow tests across admin modules

steps.title: Dependency cleanup
steps.commit_message: chore(deps): remove unused dependencies and align package hygiene
tasks: Remove verified-unused packages (example: recharts, @radix-ui/react-scroll-area) only if truly unused
Keep CSS-imported or runtime-required packages (example: shadcn, tw-animate-css) when needed
Refresh lockfile and run install checks
Document removed dependencies with rationale

steps.title: Migration governance cleanup
steps.commit_message: chore(db): establish migration governance and normalize migration strategy
tasks: Choose migration approach (keep full history vs pre-prod baseline squash)
Create docs/db-migration-policy.md with strict migration rules
Prevent duplicate or conflicting migration naming going forward
Verify prisma migrate status is clean

steps.title: CI and build hardening
steps.commit_message: ci: harden lint/build pipelines and fix platform-specific failures
tasks: Fix pnpm lint:messages reliability issues (esbuild EPERM handling/runtime pinning)
Fix build reliability for Turbopack and Prisma symlink permission path
Pin CI Node version and OS matrix explicitly
Enforce required checks: lint, i18n checks, build, and auth tests

steps.title: Release runbook and final integration
steps.commit_message: docs(release): finalize production readiness checklist and merge protocol
tasks: Create final release checklist covering security, i18n, UI, legal, build, and DB
Run full regression pass on general-fixes
Open final PR from general-fixes to main
Include rollback and post-release verification plan
